desc_ar: إنجليزي بسيط عن العمل ضمن فريق: كيف نتعاون، نتقاسم المهام، ونجتمع معاً.
why_ar: لتتعلّم كلمات الإنجليزي التي تصف العمل الجماعي والتعاون، وكيف تقارن بين الأشياء بصيغة المقارنة.
outcomes: تقرأ نصاً بسيطاً عن فريق يعمل معاً
تتعلّم كلمات: team, meeting, leader, share, help
تتعلّم صيغة المقارنة (bigger, faster, better, easier)
تكتب عن فريق تعمل أو تدرس معه
warmup: هل تحب العمل مع الآخرين أم بمفردك؟
من هو أفضل قائد فريق عرفته؟

grammar.explain_ar: نستخدم صيغة المقارنة (Comparatives) لنقارن بين شيئين. للصفات القصيرة نضيف -er (big → bigger، fast → faster). للصفات التي تنتهي بحرف y نحوّلها إلى -ier (easy → easier). للصفات الطويلة نضع more قبل الصفة (useful → more useful). وبعد المقارنة نستخدم than.
grammar.explain_en_html:
Comparatives

We use comparatives to compare two things.
Short adjectives: add -er (big → bigger, fast → faster).
Adjectives ending in y: change to -ier (easy → easier).
Long adjectives: use more (more useful, more expensive).
Use than after the comparative.
A bigger team is better than one person.

examples.sentence: A bigger team is faster than one person.
examples.translation_ar: الفريق الأكبر أسرع من شخص واحد.

examples.sentence: This plan is more useful than the old plan.
examples.translation_ar: هذه الخطة أكثر فائدة من الخطة القديمة.

examples.sentence: Working together is easier than working alone.
examples.translation_ar: العمل معاً أسهل من العمل بمفردك.

mistakes.wrong: A team is more big than one person.
mistakes.correct: A team is bigger than one person.
mistakes.explanation_ar: الصفة القصيرة big تأخذ -er، ولا نستخدم more معها.

mistakes.wrong: This plan is useful than the old one.
mistakes.correct: This plan is more useful than the old one.
mistakes.explanation_ar: الصفة الطويلة useful تحتاج more قبلها.

items.question: A big team is ___ than one person.
This plan is ___ than the old plan.
Working in a team is ___ than working alone.

readings.label: A
paragraphs: Omar works in a small office. He is part of a *team* of five people. Every morning, the team has a short *meeting*. They talk about the work for the day. The *leader* is a kind man named Ali. He helps everyone. Omar likes his job because the team is friendly.

The team has a big *task* this week. They must finish a new plan for a customer. It is a lot of work for one person. So the team *share* the work. Omar writes the words. Sara makes the pictures. They *help* each other every day.

On Friday, the team finish the plan. Everyone is happy. The leader says, 'You did a great job. A good team is *better* than one person.' They all *agree*. Omar knows that working together is *easier* and more fun.

questions.question_en: What is the passage mainly about?
choices: A team that works together on a task
A man who buys a new car
questions.correct_answer: A team that works together on a task
questions.explanation_ar: النص عن فريق يعمل معاً لإنجاز مهمّة.

questions.question_en: How many people are on Omar's team?
When does the team have a meeting?
What does the word 'share' mean in the passage?
choices: To divide the work between people
questions.correct_answer: To divide the work between people

questions.question_en: Why does the team share the work?
choices: Because it is too much for one person
questions.correct_answer: Because it is too much for one person
questions.explanation_ar: لأن العمل كثير على شخص واحد.

questions.question_en: How does Omar feel about his team?
questions.explanation_ar: عمر يحب فريقه ويستمتع بالعمل معهم.

vocab: a group of people who work together
a time when people come together to talk
We have a meeting every morning.
the person who guides a team
a piece of work you must do
to do something useful for someone
A team is better than one person.
to have the same idea as someone

readings.label: B
paragraphs: Fatima has a small shop. She sells nice bags and hats. Last year, she worked alone. It was very *difficult*. She had too many jobs every day. She was always tired. So this year, she made a small *team*. Now three good people work with her.

A *bigger* team is a big help. One person cleans the shop. One person talks to the *customers*. Fatima counts the money. The work is now much *faster* than before. The shop is also more *tidy* and clean.

Fatima and her team have a *meeting* every week. They think of *better* ideas together. Last month, they made a new plan. The plan was *cheaper* and brought more customers to the shop. Fatima is very happy. She says a good team makes a shop *stronger* and more useful.

questions.question_en: What is the main idea of the passage?
choices: A team makes Fatima's shop better
questions.correct_answer: A team makes Fatima's shop better
questions.explanation_ar: الفكرة أن الفريق جعل محل فاطمة أفضل.

questions.question_en: How did Fatima work last year?
questions.question_ar: كيف كانت فاطمة تعمل العام الماضي؟

questions.question_en: How many people work with Fatima now?
questions.question_ar: كم شخصاً يعمل مع فاطمة الآن؟

questions.question_en: Why did Fatima make a team?
choices: Because the work was too difficult alone
Because she had a lot of money
questions.correct_answer: Because the work was too difficult alone
questions.explanation_ar: لأن العمل كان صعباً عليها بمفردها.

questions.question_en: What do Fatima and her team do in the weekly meeting?
questions.question_ar: ماذا تفعل فاطمة وفريقها في الاجتماع الأسبوعي؟

questions.question_en: What happened after they made the new plan?
questions.question_ar: ماذا حدث بعد أن وضعوا الخطة الجديدة؟
choices: More customers came to the shop
questions.correct_answer: More customers came to the shop
questions.explanation_ar: جاء المزيد من الزبائن إلى المحل.

vocab: a group of people who work together
A bigger team is a big help.
One person talks to the customers.
a time when people come together to talk
They have a meeting every week.
A good team makes a shop stronger.

listening.transcript: Hi, I'm Khalid. I work in a small team of four people. We help each other every day. This week we have a big task for a new customer. It is a lot of work, so we share the jobs. A team is faster and better than one person. I love my team because the work is easier together.

exercises.explanation_ar: قال خالد إنه يعمل في فريق صغير.

exercises.question_en: How many people are in the team?
What does the team have this week?
Why do they share the jobs?
options: Because it is a lot of work

exercises.question_en: What does Khalid say about a team?
options: It is slower than one person
It is faster and better than one person
exercises.explanation_ar: قال إن الفريق أسرع وأفضل من شخص واحد.

exercises.question_en: Why does Khalid love his team?
options: Because the work is easier together
exercises.explanation_ar: يحبّ فريقه لأن العمل أسهل عندما يعملون معاً.

writing.prompt_en: Write about a team you work in or study with. How many people are in it? How do you help each other?
writing.prompt_ar: اكتب عن فريق تعمل أو تدرس معه. كم عدد أفراده؟ كيف تساعدون بعضكم؟

speaking.title_en: Talk about working in a team
speaking.prompt_en: Talk about working in a team. Do you like it? Why is a team better than working alone?
speaking.prompt_ar: تحدث عن العمل ضمن فريق. هل يعجبك؟ لماذا الفريق أفضل من العمل بمفردك؟
prep: حضّر كلمات: team, help, share, better
